extraction_notes: Licensing/professional-record packet. Extract only public, source-stated license, credential, board, certification, disciplinary, sanction, employer-role, or professional-status facts. Do not infer misconduct or competence from a license lookup alone.

source_span_guidance.instruction: Use source_spans for board name, license number, credential ID, disciplinary docket, order number, status date, page, paragraph, or screenshot/HTML section locators.

claim_assertion_type_guidance.instruction: Use source_stated_fact for status/credential facts, allegation for board allegations, denial for responses, court_finding for adjudicated findings or orders, and lead_only for unresolved lookup hits.
